productDisplayName: Hanes Men Jersey VestPack Of 2 White Innerwear Vests
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Composition Pack of 2 White sleeveless vest with a round neck, made of 100% combed ComfortFit cotton jersey, has roomy armholes, and a flat collar and armhole seams Fit Muscle fit Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Revel in the luxurious comfort of a combed cotton jersey fabric in these vests from hanes. Engineered with ComfortFit technology, these vests will contour your body perfectly, stretch to your ease and retain shape wash after wash. The flat seams at the collar and armholes offer superior comfort and a flattering fit. And what's even better is that this vest comes with a printed brand label on the inner neck - so bid goodbye to those scratchy labels and welcome comfort at its best! Model statistics The model wears size M in vests Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
